steps.t: You should talk to Pippin and Merry in Bâr Thorenion.
Both Aragorn and Éomer can be found outside of the Black Gate, in the area of the Slag Hills. Merry and Pippin have asked you to ask Aragorn and Éomer…
Gandalf has appeared nearby to Aragorn and Éomer, outside the Black Gate in the Slag Hills, and has made it clear that he wishes to talk to you.
You should return to Merry and Pippin in Bâr Thorenion with word that they have Aragorn and Éomer's blessings to go into Mordor.
You should meet Merry and Pippin at the Foothold encampment in Udûn.
You should explore down in the Udûn valley, as far as the first cross-roads, with Merry and Pippin. If you should get separated from Pippin or Merry, …
You should explore further along the main road in the Udûn valley, where the mass of soldiers' tents begins. If you should get separated from Pippin o…
Merry has suggested going a bit further along the main road in the Udûn valley, and then look for a way that turns north. If you should get separated …
Pippin has suggested moving to a flat spot just north of the main road in Udûn, and stopping to eat some and rest up. If you should get separated from…
You should <rgb=#FF00FF>sit</rgb> down with Pippin and Merry at their Mordor picnic spread, off the main road in Udûn, and share in the me…
You should talk to Merry, at the picnic spread in Udûn, and find out what startled him.
Go up the northern path from the hobbits' picnic in Udûn and see if you can find what Merry heard.
Three travel-worn half-orcs stand on the ledge above you, north of the main road in Udûn, talking amongst themselves. You should <rgb=#FF00FF>li…
Three travel-worn half-orcs stand on the ledge above you, north of the main road in Udûn, talking amongst themselves. You should continue to listen &l…
Pippin and Merry are north of the main road in Udûn. You should talk to Merry and Pippin about the trio of half-orcs you just overheard.
